REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-03-2003 IN DEPT. 606 - COURT TRIAL HELD MONDAY, 03NOV2003 IN DEPT. 606; WITS S/EXM'D; DOC. EVID. INTRODUCED & MARKED FOR COURT'S READING & REVIEW; DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLANTIFF; JAMES C. BRIDGMAN, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANTS; THE COURT RULES FROM THE BENCH AND FINDS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS CITY GRAPHICS USA, INC. AND DEFENDANT NAOMI MONTESINOS AS FOLLOWS: $8,811.70 PRINCIPAL; $229.56 INTEREST; $308.00 COSTS; $1,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $10,599.26; THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF COUNSEL HOLLOWAY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A JUDGMENT FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HON. JOHN J. CONWAY; REPORTER: JANET POND, CSR #5292; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-606, MONDAY, 03NOVEMBER2003).
JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK RANI EDWARDS, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-03-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 606, JOHN J CONWAY.
